reasoning: The market probability was 0.13 on May 15, 2025, right before the Season 50 finale of Saturday Night Live. That 13% estimate therefore effectively covered only the Season 50 finale episode plus the upcoming Fall 2025 episodes (Season 51, typically ~9 episodes before the end of the year). I have verified through extensive searches that Waymo was not featured in any SNL skit during the Spring 2025 season, including the May 17 finale hosted by Scarlett Johansson. Therefore, the only remaining opportunities are the ~9 episodes airing from late September to December 2025. Given that one of the roughly ten episodes priced into the 0.13 market estimate has passed without the event occurring, the probability decays proportionally. Additionally, SNL is NY-centric, where Waymo does not yet operate, lowering the organic likelihood of the writers heavily focusing on it barring major viral national news. Discounting slightly for potential fan-bias in the prediction market (since the forecast originated on a tech podcast), a probability of ~9% appropriately reflects the proportional remaining time window and base rate.
